fixture_catalog.catalog_family: deterministic quantum fixture catalog planning boundary

fixture_blueprints.symbolic_intent: Identity circuit shape for preserving symbolic state labels without emitted source.
fixture_blueprints.register_plan: one logical symbolic register placeholder with no allocated runtime qubit.
fixture_blueprints.measurement_plan: no observed measurement distribution; invariant statement only.
fixture_blueprints.expected_invariant: symbolic identity relation remains declared, not executed.

fixture_blueprints.symbolic_intent: Single-qubit gate intent used only for gate subset naming and review.
fixture_blueprints.register_plan: one symbolic register declaration plan with no backend allocation.
fixture_blueprints.measurement_plan: measurement mapping is declared as pending future executable authority.
fixture_blueprints.expected_invariant: gate intent is reviewable without source text or result distribution.

fixture_blueprints.symbolic_intent: Two-symbol relation topology for reviewing entanglement-form intent without execution.
fixture_blueprints.register_plan: two symbolic register labels with no simulator state allocation.
fixture_blueprints.measurement_plan: pairwise measurement relation is a plan, not an observed correlation.
fixture_blueprints.expected_invariant: topology relation remains a declared symbolic relation only.

fixture_blueprints.symbolic_intent: Measurement mapping review fixture with no shots and no histogram.
fixture_blueprints.register_plan: symbolic register names only; no memory address or backend wire.
fixture_blueprints.measurement_plan: declared symbolic measurement labels without sampling.
fixture_blueprints.expected_invariant: measurement mapping can be inspected without result materialization.

fixture_blueprints.symbolic_intent: Resource ceiling fixture for denying runtime claims before executable authority exists.
fixture_blueprints.register_plan: declared maximum symbolic register count only.
fixture_blueprints.measurement_plan: no measurement plan beyond denial of runtime observation.
fixture_blueprints.expected_invariant: resource ceiling is admission metadata, not benchmark evidence.

fixture_blueprints.symbolic_intent: Denial fixture proving that source emission and simulator input remain blocked.
fixture_blueprints.expected_invariant: attempted source or simulator input authority remains denied.

constructive_deltas: Adds a deterministic fixture catalog planning witness under the quantum boundary stack.
Defines symbolic fixture blueprint fields without executable fixture generation.
Extends quantum witness validation toward future fixture review while preserving no-runtime authority.
fracture_deltas: No executable fixture file is generated.
No OpenQASM or QIR source is emitted.
No state vector or amplitude table is materialized.
No measurement shots or histograms are emitted.
No quantum result or advantage is claimed.
next_action: Review this fixture catalog witness before proposing executable fixture serialization or simulator admission.
